post.html: Hi, I'm James. I'm currently on industrial placement in Silicon Valley at Cisco Systems in between my studies at the University of Kent, and between my day to day work I actively contribute to my ongoing projects. My (probably slightly out of date) CV is here. In my spare time you'll probably find me hopping on a cheap plane somewhere, camera in my hand and in search for an adventure. Feel free to reach out to me below regarding professional work, or just for a chat! Also, if you're into that sort of stuff, you can find my public keys here.
